emails.subject: RE: TW 2001 Throughput
emails.body: RE: TW 2001 Throughput I'll take an estimate for TW througput per day. I need something in the next hour, if possible. Thanks for immediate attention....Gina

emails.subject: RE: TW 2001 Throughput
emails.body: I have 1.8 Bcf/d for annual daily average for total system in 2001 on TW.

emails.subject: RE: TW 2001 Throughput
emails.body: Thanks! Should I call an estimate or is this actual? Also, any changes on the slide I sent yesterday? Gina

emails.subject: RE: TW 2001 Throughput
emails.body: That's what I was asking Jan previously does the 1.8 Bcf/d include any estimates or is that an actual number? Gina, I am waiting for Steve to respond to two e:mails I've sent him requesting comments on the slide. He is in Dallas today.

emails.subject: RE: TW 2001 Throughput
emails.body: Thanks! Sorry for the continuous hounding...I'm trying to wrap up a presentation for Stan. Gina
